text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey Creek, was the handkerchief by my pillow
your present for me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see you found it. Hehe, I thought I'd surprise
you this year!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That was handmade, wasn't it? The pattern and
embroidery are all designed to look like my
racewear. So, uh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Wasn't it a lot of work to make?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Not in the slightest. I kept imagining your smiling
face while I was making it, so it didn't feel like
work at all. ♪
